summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated Texas BHA website features. All new functionality working correctly: committees dropdown, newsletter page with subscription, new logo implementation, committee page restructuring, and photo sections on all pages.
passed_tests: All 20 backend API endpoints including newsletter endpoints (100% success rate)
Newsletter subscription functionality with success message display
Newsletter archive section showing 4 newsletter items
Navbar committees dropdown with all 5 sub-items: Philanthropy, Consulting, Policy, Expansion, Outreach/Marketing
New logo displayed correctly in navbar and throughout site
Committee pages accessible via new routes: /committees/philanthropy, /committees/consulting, /committees/policy, /committees/expansion, /committees/outreach
Philanthropy page with photo sections and 3 initiative cards
Outreach page with photo sections, 6 activity cards, and 3 social media links
Photo sections present on all committee and main pages
Admin authentication working with admin@texasbha.org credentials
Contact form functionality still working correctly
All navigation between pages working smoothly
